channel.title: 研究論文トラッカー
channel.description: マルチエージェント強化学習・協調ロボット搬送・自動運転関連の新着論文

item.title: V2X-Aware Trajectory Prediction for Software-Defined Vehicles
item.description: We propose a V2X-aware trajectory prediction model tailored for software-defined vehicle (SDV) platforms, incorporating inter-vehicle communication signals into motion forecasting for improved safety margins.

item.title: BEV-Fusion++: Occupancy Prediction for End-to-End Autonomous Driving
item.description: We present a sensor fusion architecture combining camera and LiDAR into a unified bird's-eye-view (BEV) representation for occupancy prediction and trajectory forecasting in end-to-end autonomous driving pipelines.

item.title: MAPPO-CT: Cooperative Transport with Multi-Agent PPO under Decentralized Control
item.description: We propose a MAPPO-based framework for cooperative transport of large objects by multiple mobile robots under a Dec-POMDP formulation. Our CTDE approach enables decentralized execution while training with centralized critics, achieving robust coordination without explicit communication.

item.title: Decentralized Multi-Robot Coordination for Warehouse Transport via Graph Attention
item.description: This paper introduces a graph attention network for scalable decentralized coordination among heterogeneous robot teams performing cooperative transport tasks in dynamic warehouse environments.

item.title: Scaling Laws for Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning in Dec-POMDPs
item.description: We study empirical scaling laws for MARL algorithms including MAPPO and QMIX across a range of Dec-POMDP benchmarks, providing guidance for compute-optimal training of cooperative agent teams.
